case_title: D. ZELINSKY & SONS, INC. VS C.T. HALL & ASSOCIATES, INC.

docket_entries.description: UNTIMELY POS, NOT SERVED 25 DAYS PRIOR TO CT DATE.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF D. ZELINSKY & SONS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT C.T. HALL & ASSOCIATES, INC. $2,636.00 PRINCIPAL, $64.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,700.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,636.00 FILED BY D. ZELINSKY & SONS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT C.T. HALL & ASSOCIATES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-03-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT C.T. HALL & ASSOCIATES, INC.
